name: Automated Wholesale Market Scraper

on:
  schedule:
    # Runs automatically every single day at midnight UTC (00:00)
    - cron: '0 0 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    # Allows you to manually trigger the scraper anytime from the GitHub UI button

jobs:
  scrape:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Check out repository code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Node.js environment
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 20
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Install Playwright Chromium Browser Binaries
      run: npx playwright install chromium

    - name: Run Scraper Script
      run: npm start

    - name: Commit and Push Updated Data to Repository
      run: |
        git config --global user.name "GitHub Actions Automation"
        git config --global user.email "actions@github.com"
        git add products.json
        # Only commit if the products.json file actually changed
        git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m "data: sync fresh factory product catalog [skip ci]"
        git push
